items.title: Wells Fargo Drops its Price Target on The Procter & Gamble Company (PG) from $173 to $170
items.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is one of the 11 Most Profitable Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Right Now. On September 25, 2025, Wells Fargo dropped its price objective from $173 to $170, marking a 1.73% revision in line with the company’s updated strategic perspective, while maintaining an Overweight rating on The Procter & Gamble Company […]
